creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I added 3dnow support to xmms using URL you submitted. However, I refused to make 
it separate port and made it an option for the main xmms port - IMO it is likely 
that this patch will be integrated into some future version of xmms. 

Anyway, thank you for submission!
